title: Online Learning
summary: Learning from data that is received in a streaming fashion, often with limited computational resources. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Incremental Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Online Batch Learning and Online Learning (already in your list).
